name: GitHub Team Workflow
description: GitHub team collaboration workflow. Session-based: drafts go to wip.json, confirm before executing. Commands: on, new, update, confirm, fix, pr, push, review, issue, show, poll, config. /gtw push generates LLM-driven conventional commit messages from git diffs (dry-run preview by default).

model.description: Model ID to use for generating issue drafts (e.g. MiniMax-M2.7, gpt-4o). Defaults to the current session's model if not set. Must be a model configured in openclaw.json.
